Toggles

Switches and checkboxes for binary choices and settings.

Switch Toggle

Toggle Switches

Auto-enrich new accounts

Automatically run data enrichment on incoming accounts

Email notifications

Send email alerts for deal status changes

Ghost Rep mode

Requires Enterprise plan

Checkboxes

Styled Checkboxes

Toggle Interaction

Interactive Toggle
Click to toggle

Usage Guidelines

• Use toggles for immediate on/off settings — no save button needed

• Use checkboxes for multi-select lists where choices are submitted together

• Active state uses brand purple — instantly recognizable

• Include a label and description next to toggles for clarity

• Disabled toggles should show 50% opacity with a reason (e.g., "Requires Enterprise")

• Transition is 200ms ease — fast enough to feel snappy, smooth enough to feel premium
